creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
rodent states after staging in the port:

actual-package-depends: dependency on /usr/lib/libmagic.so not registered (normal if it belongs to base)

but installs und seems to work without problems.

(I comment out LIB_DEPENDS=  libmagic.so:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/file in the Makefile. Also compiles and installs and seems to work - but I don't know if this is right).

The error message causes that it failes with synth.
